data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Spotify uses a microservices architecture to manage its diverse functionalities, allowing independent development and deployment.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Spotify runs its services on a cloud infrastructure to ensure scalability and availability.

data.title: Data-Driven Architecture
data.description: The platform uses data-driven methodologies to enhance user experiences.

data.title: REST and gRPC APIs
data.description: Spotify offers REST and gRPC APIs for internal and external service integrations.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Implements load balancing techniques to efficiently handle traffic across their network.
